_meta: Plain-English version of each BRSR Section-C disclosure, for the company-facing data-request PDF. Concise 'what to provide' phrasing; the formal SEBI wording stays in the CSV. Keyed by indicator id.

fields.P1-E1: % of board, KMPs, employees and workers trained on the ESG principles this year
fields.P1-E2: Fines, penalties or settlements paid to regulators or courts this year (in Rs, and count)
fields.P1-E3: Of those fines, which have been appealed (case details)
fields.P1-E4: Do you have an anti-corruption / anti-bribery policy? (Yes/No + web link)
fields.P1-E5: Number of directors, KMPs, employees or workers disciplined for bribery / corruption
fields.P1-E7: Any corrective action taken on the above fines or corruption cases
fields.P1-E8: Number of days of accounts payable
fields.P1-E9: Share of purchases & sales with related parties (%), and loans / advances to them (in Rs)
fields.P1-L1: Awareness programmes run for value-chain partners on the principles (count, % covered)
fields.P1-L2: Do you have a process to manage Board conflicts of interest? (Yes/No + details)
fields.P2-E1: R&D and capex spent on cleaner / safer products & processes (% of total R&D and capex)
fields.P2-E2: Do you have sustainable sourcing? If yes, % of inputs sourced sustainably
fields.P2-E3: How you reclaim / recycle / dispose products at end-of-life (plastics, e-waste, hazardous, other)
fields.P2-E4: Does EPR apply to you? Is your waste plan in line with the EPR plan filed with the PCB?
fields.P2-L1: Have you done a Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) on any product / service? (Yes/No + details)
fields.P2-L2: Any major social / environmental risks from your products found via LCA, and action taken
fields.P2-L3: % of recycled or reused input material used in production (by value)
fields.P2-L4: Of products / packaging reclaimed at end-of-life, amount reused, recycled, disposed (MT)
fields.P2-L5: Reclaimed products & packaging as % of products sold, by product category
fields.P3-E1: Well-being measures for employees and workers (health insurance, accident cover, etc.; % covered)
fields.P3-E2: Retirement benefits offered (PF, gratuity, ESI) for this year and last year
fields.P3-E3: Are your premises accessible to differently-abled staff? (Yes/No + steps)
fields.P3-E4: Do you have an equal-opportunity policy? (Yes/No + web link)
fields.P3-E5: Return-to-work and retention rates after parental leave
fields.P3-E6: Do you have a grievance mechanism for employees and workers? (Yes/No + details)
fields.P3-E7: Employees and workers who are members of recognised unions (count, %)
fields.P3-E8: Training given to employees and workers (count, %)
fields.P3-E9: Employees and workers who received performance / career reviews (count, %)
fields.P3-E10: Health & safety management system: do you have one, its coverage, and hazard processes
fields.P3-E11: Safety incidents this year (lost-time injury rate, recordable injuries, fatalities)
fields.P3-E12: What you do to keep the workplace safe and healthy (brief)
fields.P3-E13: Complaints on working conditions and health & safety (count)
fields.P3-E14: % of plants / offices assessed for health & safety and working conditions
fields.P3-E15: Corrective actions taken on risks found in those assessments
fields.P3-L1: Do you give life insurance or a death-compensation package? (Employees Y/N, Workers Y/N)
fields.P3-L2: How you ensure value-chain partners deduct and deposit statutory dues
fields.P3-L3: Employees / workers with serious injuries who were rehabilitated and re-employed
fields.P3-L4: Do you offer transition / retirement support programmes? (Yes/No)
fields.P3-L5: % of value-chain partners assessed (health & safety, working conditions)
fields.P3-L6: Corrective actions on risks found in value-chain partner assessments
fields.P4-E1: How you identify your key stakeholder groups (process)
fields.P4-E2: Your key stakeholder groups and how often you engage each
fields.P4-L1: How stakeholders are consulted by / for the Board on ESG topics
fields.P4-L2: Is stakeholder input used to manage ESG topics? (Yes/No + examples)
fields.P4-L3: Engagement with vulnerable / marginalised stakeholders and actions taken
fields.P5-E1: Employees and workers trained on human rights (count, %)
fields.P5-E2: Employees and workers paid at or above minimum wage (count, %)
fields.P5-E3: Median remuneration and the male-to-female pay ratio
fields.P5-E4: Do you have a person / committee responsible for human-rights issues? (Yes/No)
fields.P5-E5: Internal mechanism to handle human-rights grievances (brief)
fields.P5-E6: Complaints on harassment, discrimination, child labour, forced labour, wages (count)
fields.P5-E7: POSH complaints (sexual harassment) filed this year
fields.P5-E8: How you protect complainants in harassment / discrimination cases
fields.P5-E9: Do your contracts include human-rights requirements? (Yes/No)
fields.P5-E10: % of plants / offices assessed for human rights (child / forced labour, wages, etc.)
fields.P5-E11: Corrective actions taken on risks found in those assessments
fields.P5-L1: Any business process changed as a result of a human-rights grievance (details)
fields.P5-L2: Scope and coverage of any human-rights due diligence done
fields.P5-L3: Is your office accessible to differently-abled visitors? (Yes/No)
fields.P5-L4: % of value-chain partners assessed on human rights
fields.P5-L5: Corrective actions on risks found in value-chain human-rights assessments
fields.P6-E1: Total energy used last year (electricity + fuels), and energy per rupee of turnover
fields.P6-E2: Are any sites covered under the PAT energy scheme? If yes, targets set vs achieved
fields.P6-E3: Water drawn and consumed, by source (surface, ground, third-party, etc.) in kilolitres
fields.P6-E4: Water discharged, by destination and treatment level (kilolitres)
fields.P6-E5: Do you have Zero Liquid Discharge? If yes, its coverage
fields.P6-E6: Air emissions other than greenhouse gases (NOx, SOx, particulate matter, VOCs)
fields.P6-E7: Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions, and emissions per rupee of turnover
fields.P6-E9: Waste generated by type, and waste recycled vs disposed (metric tonnes)
fields.P6-E10: Your waste-management practices and how you cut hazardous / toxic chemicals (brief)
fields.P6-E11: Any operations in or near ecologically sensitive areas needing clearances (details)
fields.P6-E12: Environmental Impact Assessments (EIA) of projects done this year
fields.P6-E13: Are you compliant with environmental laws (Water, Air, EP Act)? Any non-compliances
fields.P6-L1: Water drawn, consumed and discharged in water-stressed areas (kilolitres)
fields.P6-L3: Impact on biodiversity in sensitive areas, and prevention / remediation done
fields.P6-L4: Any initiatives or technology used to improve resource efficiency or cut emissions / waste
fields.P6-L5: Do you have a business-continuity and disaster-management plan? (brief / web link)
fields.P6-L6: Any major environmental impact from your value chain, and what you did about it
fields.P6-L7: % of value-chain partners assessed for environmental impact
fields.P6-L8: Green Credits generated or bought (by you and your top value-chain partners)
fields.P7-E1: Number of trade / industry associations you belong to, and your top 10
fields.P7-E2: Any corrective action on anti-competitive conduct (from regulator orders)
fields.P8-E1: Social Impact Assessments (SIA) of projects done this year
fields.P8-E2: Projects where Rehabilitation & Resettlement (R&R) is ongoing
fields.P8-E3: How you receive and resolve community grievances (mechanism)
fields.P8-E4: % of input material sourced from local / nearby suppliers (by value)
fields.P8-E5: Wages paid to people employed in smaller towns (as % of total wage cost)
fields.P8-L1: Actions taken to reduce negative social impacts found in the SIAs
fields.P8-L2: CSR projects in government-designated aspirational districts
fields.P8-L3: Preferential procurement from marginalised / vulnerable groups (policy, % of procurement)
fields.P8-L4: Benefits shared from intellectual property based on traditional knowledge
fields.P8-L5: Corrective actions on any disputes involving traditional knowledge
fields.P8-L6: Beneficiaries of your CSR projects (count, % from vulnerable groups)
fields.P9-E1: How you receive and respond to consumer complaints and feedback (mechanism)
fields.P9-E2: % of turnover from products carrying info on environmental / social parameters and safe use
fields.P9-E3: Consumer complaints by type (data privacy, advertising, cyber-security, quality, etc.)
fields.P9-E4: Product recalls on safety grounds (number and reasons)
fields.P9-E5: Do you have a cyber-security / data-privacy policy? (Yes/No + web link)
fields.P9-E6: Corrective actions on advertising, cyber-security / privacy, recalls, or regulator penalties
fields.P9-E7: Data breaches this year (number, % involving personal data, impact)
fields.P9-L1: Where customers can find product / service information (web links)
fields.P9-L2: Steps taken to educate consumers on safe and responsible use of your products
fields.P9-L3: How you inform consumers of any risk of service disruption
fields.P9-L4: Extra product info you display beyond legal requirements; any consumer-satisfaction survey
